mapper.insert: INSERT INTO status_history ( history_id, payment_instruction_id, related_external_call_id, sequence_in_payment, previous_status, next_status, event_type, reason_code, reason_message, triggered_by, operator_id, payload_snapshot, event_occurred_at, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{paymentInstructionId}, #{relatedExternalCallId}, #{sequenceInPayment}, #{previousStatus}, #{nextStatus}, #{eventType}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonMessage}, #{triggeredBy}, #{operatorId}, #{payloadSnapshot}, #{eventOccurredAt}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
